input_text: Bro seriously ah, gomen potong subsidi lagi but minister beli Merz baru. Like hello? Rakyat makan maggi tapi you all makan lobster. Priorities much?
reason: Code-switching BM-EN political frustration about subsidy cuts vs ministerial spending. Legitimate criticism, not incitement.
suggested_rewrite: The contrast between subsidy cuts affecting citizens and perceived luxury spending by officials is a valid concern that should be raised through proper democratic channels.

input_text: Wah this one very the pandai one lah. Masuk universiti through quota system then say orang lain tak work hard. Pot calling kettle black sial.
reason: Code-switching BM-EN remark mocking university quota system with implied racial undertone. S2 because it targets a policy tied to ethnic privilege.
suggested_rewrite: Merit and access to education are important conversations. Focusing on improving opportunities for all students is more productive than questioning others' qualifications.

input_text: Auntie kat pasar cakap: 'dulu semua kaum boleh duduk satu meja makan, sekarang semua nak separate. Sedih lah Malaysia ni.'
reason: Nostalgic reflection on declining inter-ethnic social mixing. Safe expression of sadness about communal separation.

input_text: I heard from my uncle's WhatsApp group that the water supply is being poisoned by 'outsiders'. Better stock up bottled water!!!
reason: Forwarded-message style rumor about water poisoning by unnamed outsiders. Classic viral misinformation pattern.
suggested_rewrite: Unverified claims about water contamination should not be spread. Check official sources like SPAN or your local water authority for water quality updates.

input_text: Menteri tu kata ekonomi bagus. Bagus untuk siapa? Untuk kroni dia lah. Kita ni cuma kena GST naik, harga minyak naik, gaji sama. Lawak.
reason: Sarcastic political commentary about economic policy benefiting cronies. Legitimate criticism using sarcasm, not incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Economic indicators don't always reflect lived experience. Citizens can advocate for policies that address cost of living through their elected representatives.

input_text: 'Balik tongsan lah kalau tak suka!' — overheard this at the kopitiam. 2024 and people still talking like this. So sad.
reason: Reporting/quoting hateful speech heard in public to express disapproval. The speaker is condemning the quote, not endorsing it. Safe.

input_text: According to Bernama, the suspect shouted 'bunuh semua kafir' before being detained by police at the shopping mall.
reason: News-style reporting quoting a criminal suspect's words as factual reporting. Not endorsing the speech, reporting it.

input_text: Kalau ikut logik diorang, kita yang bayar cukai ni patut tutup mulut je la. Terima je apa kerajaan buat. Demokrasi konon.
reason: Sarcastic critique of government expecting silent taxpayers. Legitimate democratic frustration, not incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Taxpayers have every right to question government decisions. Active civic participation through proper channels strengthens democracy.

input_text: 这个国家越来越不适合华人住了
reason: Statement that Malaysia is becoming unlivable for Chinese. Vague communal grievance, S2 because it frames ethnic exclusion without specifics or call to action.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对某些政策感到不满，具体指出问题并通过民主渠道寻求改变比笼统的族群抱怨更有效。

input_text: My friend forward me a message saying the new vaccine has microchip inside. Government want to track all citizens. Don't take it!!!
reason: Classic forwarded conspiracy theory about vaccine microchips. Dangerous health misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Vaccine microchip claims have been thoroughly debunked. Consult KKM or WHO for verified vaccine safety information before making health decisions.

input_text: BREAKING: Viral di Telegram — kilang makanan di Nilai guna daging babi untuk buat nugget ayam halal! Boikot sekarang!
reason: Viral-style halal food contamination hoax designed to provoke religious outrage and business boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan pencemaran halal perlu disahkan oleh JAKIM sebelum disebarkan. Menyebarkan maklumat palsu tentang status halal boleh didakwa di bawah Akta Komunikasi.

input_text: Haha PM cakap rakyat didahulukan. Rakyat didahulukan kena bayar tol la, bayar cukai la, bayar parking hospital la. Memang didahulukan — didahulukan bayar!
reason: Wordplay sarcasm on 'rakyat didahulukan' slogan. Pointed but legitimate political humor about citizen burden.
suggested_rewrite: Humor yang menyindir slogan politik mencerminkan kekecewaan rakyat. Saluran rasmi seperti surat kepada YB boleh menyuarakan isu ini dengan lebih berkesan.

input_text: Kawasan 'mereka' tu memang macam tu lah. Kotor, bising, tak terurus. Dah memang darah daging diorang.
reason: Communal euphemism using 'mereka' and 'diorang' to disparage unnamed ethnic group's living standards as inherent racial trait.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah kebersihan dan kebisingan di kawasan perumahan memerlukan penyelesaian infrastruktur, bukan stereotaip kaum.

input_text: Abang grab driver cerita — penumpang mabuk malam tadi hina agama Islam depan dia. Dia sabar je. Respect to him.
reason: Anecdote about a Grab driver showing patience when passenger insulted Islam. Praising restraint. Safe.

input_text: Eh jangan lah cakap macam tu pasal orang India. Diorang pun contribute banyak kat negara ni. Not cool bro.
reason: Someone defending the Indian community against negative remarks. Pro-social speech, safe.

input_text: 政府说经济很好，可是我周围的人都在失业。到底哪个马来西亚的经济好？部长们住的那个吗？
reason: Sarcastic disconnect between government economic claims and lived reality of unemployment. Legitimate criticism.
suggested_rewrite: 经济数据和个人经历之间的差距是值得关注的政策问题。向民意代表反映就业困难有助于推动政策改善。

input_text: Forwarded as received: Banks in Malaysia are about to collapse! Withdraw all your money NOW before it's too late! Share this to save your family!
reason: Forwarded message designed to cause bank run panic. S3 because bank runs can cause systemic economic damage.
suggested_rewrite: Bank run rumors are dangerous and potentially criminal. Malaysian banks are protected by PIDM deposit insurance. Verify any financial claims with BNM before acting.

input_text: 'Semua Cina ni penipu' — ini bukan saya yang cakap, ini memang pengalaman ramai orang Melayu. Saya just report what people think.
reason: Attributing a racist generalization to 'many Malays' while claiming to just report. Using crowd attribution to launder personal bigotry.
suggested_rewrite: Stereotaip kaum tidak boleh dijustifikasi dengan mendakwa ia pendapat ramai. Pengalaman negatif individu tidak mewakili seluruh kaum.

input_text: Newspaper headline: 'Suspek ugut bunuh imam masjid kerana khutbah politik' — this is why we need better security at mosques.
reason: Quoting a newspaper headline about mosque threats and calling for better security. Constructive response to reported violence. Safe.

input_text: Uncle kat kedai kopi cakap: dulu time Tun M semua okay, sekarang ni semua kaum gaduh. Rindu zaman dulu.
reason: Nostalgic political reminiscence about past governance. Opinion about political era, not targeting any group. Safe.

input_text: Haih these people ah, come to our country, don't want to learn our language, don't want to follow our culture. Then complain discrimination. What logic?
reason: Vague 'these people' likely targeting immigrants or minority groups. Integration criticism veering into xenophobia.
suggested_rewrite: Cultural integration is a two-way process. Communities can encourage language learning and cultural exchange while respecting diversity.

input_text: Saya bukan rasis tapi memang la fakta orang Melayu pemalas. Tengok je statistik. Cina semua rajin. India pun sama. Kita je lembab.
reason: 'I'm not racist but' followed by racial generalizations about work ethic. Self-deprecating variant but still reinforces ethnic stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: Pencapaian individu tidak ditentukan oleh kaum. Stereotaip 'pemalas' atau 'rajin' berdasarkan etnik mengabaikan faktor sosioekonomi yang kompleks.

input_text: Kalau betul la PAS menang PRU, confirm negara ni jadi macam Afghanistan. Perempuan kena tutup semua, hukum hudud merata. Nak ke?
reason: Comparing PAS governance to Afghanistan. Exaggerated political fearmongering about Islamic party, but not direct incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Kritikan terhadap dasar parti politik harus berdasarkan manifesto sebenar mereka, bukan perbandingan melampau. Perbahasan demokratik perlu berlandaskan fakta.

input_text: My Tamil grandma always says: 'In this country, if your skin dark, your life hard.' She's not wrong though. Just look around.
reason: Quoting grandmother about colorism/racial discrimination. Sharing lived experience of discrimination — borderline safe but carries implicit accusation of systemic racism.
suggested_rewrite: Colorism and racial bias are documented challenges in many societies. Addressing systemic inequalities requires institutional reform, not just awareness.

input_text: Dalam group WhatsApp family aku, ada orang share yang kerajaan dah bagi kelulusan tukar Malaysia jadi negara komunis. Confirm fake tapi ramai percaya.
reason: Reporting a fake WhatsApp rumor and calling it out as fake. Media literacy in action. Safe.

input_text: 哈哈哈 马来人说要回中国，印度人说要回印度。原住民才是本地人好吗？大家都是移民。
reason: Provocative take on who are 'real' locals in Malaysia. While factually referencing Orang Asli, it's used to delegitimize Malay indigenous claims — touchy constitutional territory.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的多元民族历史很复杂。所有公民都受宪法保护，讨论移民历史时应尊重各族群的敏感性。

input_text: Makcik cleaner kat office aku ni rajin gila. Satu department dia handle sorang. Tapi gaji cuma RM1200. Sistem yang exploit orang bawahan.
reason: Praising individual worker while criticizing the system that underpays them. Legitimate labor rights concern.
suggested_rewrite: Pekerja yang berdedikasi berhak mendapat gaji yang berpatutan. Isu gaji minimum untuk pekerja sokongan perlu diperjuangkan melalui kesatuan sekerja.

input_text: Alert‼️ Forward from ustaz group: air zamzam palsu yang mengandungi bahan haram sedang dijual di pasar Ramadan. Jangan beli!!
reason: Forwarded religious product scare about fake zamzam water at Ramadan market. Unverified claim exploiting religious sensitivity.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan produk palsu perlu disahkan oleh pihak berkuasa sebelum disebarkan. Hubungi KPDNHEP atau JAKIM jika ada bukti produk haram dipasarkan.

input_text: Satire: 'Malaysian politician discovers something called accountability. Scientists say it's a new species never before seen in Parliament.'
reason: Political satire about lack of accountability in Parliament. Clearly labeled as satire. Safe political humor.

input_text: Orang kampung cakap: jangan bagi anak perempuan belajar tinggi sangat nanti takde siapa nak kahwin. Mentaliti ni kena ubah.
reason: Quoting a backward mentality about women's education and then calling for change. Constructive criticism of conservative attitudes. Safe.

input_text: Kerajaan announce budget baru: bantuan untuk B40 naik RM50. Wow. Dengan RM50 tu boleh la beli setengah tangki minyak. Terima kasih sangat.
reason: Biting sarcasm about inadequate B40 aid increase. Legitimate critique of insufficient welfare policy.
suggested_rewrite: Keberkesanan bantuan B40 perlu dinilai berdasarkan kos sara hidup sebenar. Cadangan penambahbaikan boleh dikemukakan melalui ECOS atau wakil rakyat.

input_text: 'Keling' tu bukan rasis pun, dulu semua orang guna. Sekarang ni semua nak sensitif sangat. PC culture gone mad.
reason: Defending use of racial slur 'Keling' as not racist. Normalizing slurs under anti-PC framing.
suggested_rewrite: Perkataan 'Keling' telah lama diiktiraf sebagai slur perkauman yang menyakitkan. Menghormati perasaan orang lain bukan 'terlalu sensitif' — ia adalah budi bahasa asas.

input_text: Just read that hate crimes against Muslims increased 30% last year in Malaysia. As a Chinese Malaysian, this worries me too. We need solidarity.
reason: Cross-ethnic solidarity expressing concern about anti-Muslim hate crimes. Pro-social, bridge-building speech. Safe.

input_text: Abang polis kat roadblock tu tanya IC je tapi muka dia tengok aku macam tengok penjenayah. Rasa macam second class citizen kat negara sendiri.
reason: Personal experience of feeling racially profiled at police roadblock. Sharing discrimination experience, S1 mild concern due to implicit ethnic tension.
suggested_rewrite: Pengalaman seperti ini boleh dilaporkan melalui EAIC (Suruhanjaya Integriti Agensi Penguatkuasaan). Semua rakyat berhak dilayan dengan maruah.

input_text: Group chat forward: CONFIRMED — next week semua pekerja Bangladesh akan dihantar balik. Jangan hire dulu! Source: insider JIM.
reason: Forwarded fake insider information about mass deportation of Bangladeshi workers. Unverified claim causing hiring disruption.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar imigresen hanya disahkan melalui kenyataan rasmi kerajaan. Jangan sebarkan 'maklumat orang dalam' yang tidak sahih kerana ia boleh mengganggu pasaran buruh.

input_text: Bukan nak racist, tapi Indian wedding memang bising gila. 3 hari 3 malam. Kita Melayu pun celebrate tapi tak sampai kacau jiran macam tu.
reason: 'Not racist but' complaint about Indian wedding noise with comparative ethnic framing. Cultural complaint with racial generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi bising dari majlis perkahwinan boleh ditangani melalui peraturan PBT tanpa mengira kaum penganjur. Dialog jiran adalah langkah pertama yang baik.

input_text: Professor UKM tulis paper kata dasar ekonomi baru perlu dikaji semula sebab tak capai objektif asal. Akademik freedom ni penting.
reason: Supporting academic freedom for professor who critiqued national economic policy. Protecting academic discourse. Safe.

input_text: Viral TikTok: 'Tengok la budak Melayu skate kat masjid, diorang memang tak hormat tempat ibadat.' But actually it's the mosque car park after hours.
reason: Debunking a viral video misrepresenting youth skating in mosque car park as disrespecting mosque. Media literacy. Safe.

input_text: 我爸爸说以前马来人和华人是好邻居。现在政客为了选票把大家分开了。真的很可悲。
reason: Reflection on how politicians divide ethnic groups for votes. Nostalgic, pro-unity sentiment. Safe.

input_text: Aku share screenshot dari group WhatsApp kampung: 'Amaran — orang asing bawa penyakit baru masuk kampung kita. Halau mereka!' Tolong lah jangan percaya benda ni.
reason: Sharing xenophobic WhatsApp message to debunk it. Actively countering misinformation. Safe.

input_text: If you look at crime stats, certain areas have higher rates. But correlation isn't causation — poverty, not race, drives crime. Don't be lazy thinkers.
reason: Nuanced discussion about crime statistics pushing back against racial explanations in favor of socioeconomic analysis. Constructive. Safe.

input_text: Kawan aku orang Melayu convert jadi Kristian. Family disown dia. Tapi siapa kita nak judge? Itu antara dia dengan Tuhan.
reason: Discussing Malay apostasy sympathetically. Extremely sensitive topic in Malaysia where Malay apostasy is legally restricted. S1 because it's expressed compassionately but touches constitutional-religious boundary.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pertukaran agama dalam kalangan Melayu adalah sangat sensitif dari segi perlembagaan dan undang-undang. Empati terhadap individu tetap penting sambil menghormati kerangka undang-undang.

input_text: Masjid kat kampung aku buka pintu untuk mangsa banjir semua kaum. Hindu, Kristian, semua boleh masuk tidur. THIS is Islam.
reason: Celebrating a mosque opening doors to flood victims of all faiths. Positive interfaith example. Safe.

input_text: Non-Muslim nak masuk surau kena izin. Muslim boleh masuk tokong sesuka hati. Double standard much? Or maybe we're just more welcoming. 😏
reason: Comparing access rules between mosque and temple with provocative emoji. Framed as 'just asking' but intentionally provocative about religious double standards.
suggested_rewrite: Peraturan akses tempat ibadat berbeza mengikut agama dan ada sebab teologinya. Dialog antara agama boleh membantu pemahaman bersama.

input_text: DAP = Destroy All Pribumi. Heard this at ceramah last night. The crowd was cheering. This kind of rhetoric is dangerous.
reason: Reporting dangerous political rhetoric heard at ceramah and calling it out as dangerous. Whistleblowing on hate speech. Safe.

input_text: Diorang kata nak jaga 'hak bumiputera' tapi sebenarnya jaga hak kroni je. Orang Melayu biasa pun kena tipu sama.
reason: Critique of bumiputera rights being captured by cronies rather than ordinary Malays. Legitimate structural criticism from within community.
suggested_rewrite: Kritikan terhadap pelaksanaan dasar bumiputera adalah penting untuk memastikan manfaat sampai kepada golongan sasaran yang sebenar.

input_text: Isu kalimah Allah — non-Muslim nak guna, Muslim kata tak boleh. Constitutional court pun split. This is genuinely hard. No easy answers.
reason: Balanced acknowledgment of the Allah word usage controversy as genuinely complex. No advocacy for either side. Safe.

input_text: 为什么马来西亚只有一个种族可以买到便宜的房子？这不是歧视是什么？我辛苦工作也买不起。
reason: Questioning bumiputera housing discounts as racial discrimination. Valid policy criticism but framed with ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: 住房可负担性是涉及多方面的政策议题。各族群都面临房价挑战。通过正式渠道倡导公平住房政策更为有效。

input_text: Weh korang tengok tak video tu? Pak imam sindir politician dalam khutbah Jumaat. Savage gila tapi factual. Respek.
reason: Celebrating an imam's political commentary during Friday sermon. Political speech in religious context but treated as legitimate commentary. Safe.

input_text: Confession: I'm Malay and I eat at Chinese kopitiam every day. My kampung friends say I'm 'jual maruah bangsa.' Bro it's just chicken rice. Chill.
reason: Light-hearted pushback against ethnic food policing. Pro-integration sentiment. Safe.

input_text: Betul ke orang cakap budak Tamil semua gangster? Kawan baik aku orang Tamil, dia doktor sekarang. Stereotaip ni bahaya.
reason: Questioning Tamil gangster stereotype using personal counter-example. Anti-stereotype speech. Safe.

input_text: "Ini tanah Melayu, kalau tak suka boleh keluar" — mantan PM pernah cakap ni publicly. But can we move past this rhetoric already?
reason: Quoting former PM's exclusionary rhetoric to critique it. Attribution to public figure makes it reportage, but the quote itself carries communal weight. S1.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia belongs to all its citizens regardless of ethnicity. Moving beyond exclusionary rhetoric requires leadership from all communities.

input_text: Orang India complain kuil kena roboh untuk highway. Tapi Melayu punya tanah pun kena ambil jugak. Semua rakyat sama je kena. Jangan politikkan.
reason: Contextualizing temple demolition complaints by noting all communities face land acquisition. Trying to de-racialize a racially charged issue. Safe.

input_text: Dengar cerita — ada group kat Telegram plan nak serang perarakan Maulidur Rasul kat KL bulan depan. Anyone can confirm?
reason: Spreading unverified rumor about planned attack on Maulidur Rasul procession. Even as a question, this can cause panic.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada ancaman keselamatan, laporkan terus kepada PDRM, bukan sebarkan di media sosial. Menyebarkan khabar angin ancaman boleh menyebabkan panik awam.

input_text: 我朋友在政府部门工作，她说很多马来同事午餐后就不回来办公了。她不敢说因为怕被标签'种族主义'。
reason: Anonymous anecdote about Malay civil servants not returning after lunch, using 'friend' attribution. Racial work ethic stereotype disguised as workplace observation.
suggested_rewrite: 工作纪律问题应通过人力资源部门的正式渠道处理。将个别人的行为归咎于整个族群是不公平的。

input_text: Ada orang share gambar 'tulisan Jawi di sekolah vernakular' dan marah-marah. Tapi itu bukan Jawi pun, itu tulisan khat Arab biasa kat kelas Pendidikan Islam. Salah info.
reason: Correcting misinformation about Jawi script controversy in vernacular schools. Fact-checking viral anger. Safe.

input_text: If DAP wins the state, sure all mosques will be demolished. That's what they want. Chinese agenda. 100%.
reason: False claim that DAP would demolish mosques as part of a 'Chinese agenda'. Political fearmongering with racial and religious dimensions.
suggested_rewrite: DAP has never advocated demolishing mosques. Spreading false claims about any party's stance on religious institutions is dangerous misinformation that undermines democratic discourse.

input_text: Benda yang tak best jadi Malaysian: kena isi borang, race: ___. Everywhere. Hospital, school, bank. Why does everything need my race?
reason: Questioning pervasive racial classification in Malaysian forms. Valid civic concern about institutional racialism, expressed with frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Racial classification in forms is a long-standing policy debate. Advocates for reform can engage with government consultations on reducing unnecessary racial data collection.

input_text: Orang tua aku selalu pesan: hormati semua agama, semua kaum. Kita sama-sama anak Malaysia. Mesej ni kena teruskan.
reason: Sharing parents' teaching about respecting all races and religions. Pro-unity intergenerational wisdom. Safe.

input_text: Muslim friends invited me (Christian) to buka puasa at their house. Beautiful experience. More of this please Malaysia. ❤️
reason: Christian sharing positive interfaith iftar experience. Bridge-building content. Safe.

input_text: Pernah kena marah sebab wish 'Merry Christmas' kat kawan Melayu. Dia kata haram. Tapi ramai Muslim lain yang okay je. Depends on individual la.
reason: Sharing experience about Christmas greetings controversy and reaching balanced individual-level conclusion. Nuanced religious tolerance. Safe.

input_text: 经济不好就怪外劳。经济好的时候谁在做那些脏活累活？双重标准。
reason: Pointing out double standards about foreign workers — blamed during downturns, relied upon during booms. S1 because it has a communal edge.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳政策需要一致性。公平的劳工政策应在经济好坏时都保护工人的权益。

input_text: Thread viral: My mother-in-law is Chinese, father-in-law Malay. During Raya, they serve rendang AND bak kut teh on the same table. Peak Malaysia moment.
reason: Celebrating interracial family's food culture during Raya. Heartwarming multicultural content. Safe.

input_text: Aku dengar dari kawan yang kerja kat hospital — doktor bagi priority treatment pada patients Melayu dulu sebelum kaum lain. Betul ke ni?
reason: Spreading unverified claim about racial priority in hospital treatment. Even framed as a question, this accusation can inflame ethnic tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Hospital Malaysia memberikan rawatan mengikut keterukan kes (triage), bukan kaum. Jika ada bukti diskriminasi, laporkan kepada KKM secara rasmi.

input_text: Kalau orang Melayu kritik UMNO, semua okay. Kalau orang Cina kritik UMNO, 'jangan campur hal Melayu.' This country has unwritten rules.
reason: Observing double standards in who can criticize Malay political parties. Valid observation about unequal political discourse space.
suggested_rewrite: All citizens have equal right to critique any political party. Healthy democracy requires equal participation in political discourse regardless of ethnicity.

input_text: Surau company aku tak cukup besar untuk semua pekerja Muslim solat Jumaat. HR suruh gilir-gilir. Kalau surau bar boleh buat besar kenapa surau solat tak boleh?
reason: Frustration about inadequate workplace prayer room with sarcastic comparison. Legitimate workplace religious accommodation concern.
suggested_rewrite: Majikan perlu menyediakan surau yang mencukupi untuk pekerja Muslim. Bawa isu ini kepada HR secara rasmi dengan cadangan penyelesaian praktikal.

input_text: Tamil school closing down because not enough students. But actually it's because government doesn't maintain the building and parents have no choice.
reason: Alleging government neglect causing Tamil school closure. S1 due to legitimate concern about vernacular education equity.
suggested_rewrite: Vernacular school maintenance is a government responsibility. If a school is closing due to disrepair, the community can petition the Education Ministry for emergency repairs.

input_text: Aku as Malay nak cakap — isu tanah Orang Asli ni bukan 'masalah diorang'. Kita ambil tanah diorang. Kita kena fix.
reason: Malay person taking responsibility for Orang Asli land rights issues. Pro-social allyship. Safe.

input_text: 看到网上有人说'华人不忠于马来西亚'。作为第四代马来西亚华人，我的曾祖父帮助建设了这个国家的铁路。别跟我说不忠。
reason: Responding to loyalty accusations with historical contribution argument. Defensive but carries communal tension. S1.
suggested_rewrite: 所有公民对国家的忠诚不应被质疑。每个族群都对国家建设做出了重要贡献。

input_text: Eh aku nampak kat Twitter orang share — 'all Rohingya are criminals and rapists.' Ini dehumanization bro. Same rhetoric used against Jews in 1930s.
reason: Calling out dehumanizing rhetoric against Rohingya by drawing historical parallel. Anti-hate speech advocacy. Safe.

input_text: Siapa yang betul-betul control ekonomi Malaysia? Bukan Melayu, bukan Cina — tapi GLC dan kroni. Wake up people. Stop blaming each other.
reason: Redirecting ethnic economic blame toward GLCs and cronies. Structural critique with populist tone. S1 because it starts with racial framing.
suggested_rewrite: Perbincangan tentang kawalan ekonomi perlu melampaui naratif perkauman. Fokus pada ketelusan GLC dan anti-rasuah memberi manfaat kepada semua rakyat.

input_text: Random aunty at kenduri: 'Dulu sekolah campur, sekarang semua asing-asing. Patut la tak faham antara satu sama lain.'
reason: Quoting elderly woman's observation about school segregation's impact on inter-ethnic understanding. Nostalgic social commentary. Safe.

input_text: Yang peliknya — bila cakap pasal hak Orang Asli semua senyap. Tapi bila cakap pasal hak Melayu atau Cina semua nak gaduh. Priorities.
reason: Critiquing selective attention to ethnic rights while neglecting Orang Asli. Valid observation but phrased provocatively. S1.
suggested_rewrite: Hak Orang Asli sering diabaikan dalam perbahasan nasional. Advokasi untuk semua komuniti terpinggir harus menjadi keutamaan bersama.

input_text: Received on WhatsApp: '⚠️ WARNING: New scam targeting ONLY Malay/Muslim businesses. Chinese syndicate behind it. Forward to protect our people!'
reason: Forwarded message racializing a scam as Chinese syndicate targeting Malays. Classic ethnic fearmongering format.
suggested_rewrite: Scam warnings should be verified through official channels like PDRM or BNM. Attributing crimes to ethnic groups without evidence is dangerous and potentially seditious.

input_text: My Malay neighbor brought kuih raya for Deepavali. My Indian neighbor brought murukku for Hari Raya. We all eat together every festival. This is the Malaysia I know.
reason: Celebrating inter-ethnic food sharing during festivals. Ideal multicultural harmony. Safe.

input_text: Aku muak dengan politikus yang guna isu agama dan kaum untuk menang undi. Lepas tu rakyat yang gaduh sesama sendiri. Mereka yang untung.
reason: Frustration with politicians weaponizing race and religion for votes. Meta-commentary on political manipulation. S1.
suggested_rewrite: Kesedaran tentang taktik politik yang memecah-belahkan masyarakat adalah penting. Pengundi boleh menolak retorik perkauman melalui undi mereka.

input_text: Fun fact: Malaysia ada lebih 60 bahasa asli selain BM, EN, ZH, TA. Tapi berapa kerat yang tahu? Kita obsess dengan 4 kaum utama je.
reason: Highlighting linguistic diversity beyond the 4 main ethnic groups. Educational and inclusive. Safe.

input_text: Setiap kali ada banjir, surau dan masjid jadi pusat pemindahan untuk SEMUA orang. Gereja dan kuil pun sama. Ini lah Malaysia sebenar.
reason: Celebrating how all religious institutions serve as flood shelters for everyone. Positive interfaith solidarity. Safe.

input_text: 有人在微信上说马来西亚华人学校即将被全部关闭。这是假消息。教育部已经否认了。别再转发了。
reason: Debunking false WeChat rumor about Chinese school closures by citing official denial. Counter-misinformation. Safe.

input_text: Malaysia is the only country where the majority acts like a minority — always feeling threatened. Bumiputera rights, Islam is official religion, PM must be Malay. But still feel threatened?
reason: Challenging Malay majority victimhood narrative by listing constitutional protections. Provocative framing of a real sociological observation.
suggested_rewrite: Constitutional protections exist within a historical context. Productive discourse examines how existing frameworks can better serve all communities' sense of security.

input_text: Tadi kat canteen, budak form 3 hina agama Hindu depan kawan dia yang Hindu. Cikgu dengar tapi buat tak tahu. Sistem pendidikan gagal.
reason: Reporting religious bullying in school that teacher ignored. Reporting a problem for systemic change, S1.
suggested_rewrite: Penghinaan agama di sekolah perlu ditangani segera. Laporkan kepada pentadbir sekolah dan JPN. Program kesedaran kepelbagaian perlu diperkukuhkan.

input_text: Hot take: vernacular schools actually HELP national unity because students learn their heritage language AND BM. The real divider is economic inequality, not schools.
reason: Defending vernacular schools as beneficial for unity and redirecting focus to economic inequality. Constructive opinion. Safe.

input_text: Mak aku Cina, ayah aku Melayu. Aku isi borang, race mesti pilih satu. Aku bukan setengah-setengah — aku penuh kedua-duanya.
reason: Mixed-race Malaysian expressing frustration about racial classification forms. Identity affirmation. Safe.

input_text: Aku kerja kat GLC. Promotion based on who you know, not what you know. Tapi kalau cakap pasal ni orang kata kita 'anti-Malay.' No lah, I'm anti-cronyism.
reason: GLC cronyism critique deflecting racial accusations. Legitimate workplace meritocracy concern but politically charged. S1.
suggested_rewrite: Meritocracy in GLCs is a legitimate governance concern. Anti-corruption advocacy should focus on systemic reform rather than ethnic framing.

input_text: Forwarded 100x: Confirmed by 'insider' — next week petrol price going up RM2 per liter!! Stock up NOW!! Source: trust me bro.
reason: Viral forwarded message with fake fuel price panic claim with satirical 'trust me bro' source. Dangerous even if partly sarcastic.
suggested_rewrite: Fuel price changes are announced weekly by the government. Only trust official announcements from the Finance Ministry. Viral price panic posts are almost always false.

input_text: Eh guys actually Sabah and Sarawak contribute most of the petroleum revenue but get the least development. East Malaysians have every right to be angry.
reason: Highlighting Sabah/Sarawak resource vs development inequality. Legitimate regional grievance, common political discourse.
suggested_rewrite: East Malaysia's development gap relative to petroleum contributions is a well-documented issue. Advocacy through MA63 review processes and state-level politics can drive meaningful change.

input_text: 我从来不觉得自己是'马来西亚华人'。我就是马来西亚人。为什么一定要加上族群标签？
reason: Rejecting ethnic labels in favor of national identity. Pro-unity sentiment. Safe.

input_text: Pernah dengar orang cakap: 'jangan jual rumah kat orang India nanti jatuh harga.' Ini bukan stereotaip ke? Ini rasisme.
reason: Calling out racist housing discrimination against Indians. Anti-racism advocacy. Safe.

input_text: Bro the food court at KLCC has everything — nasi lemak next to dim sum next to roti canai next to nasi briyani. THIS is multiculturalism, not parliament debates.
reason: Using food court diversity as metaphor for real multiculturalism vs political debates. Lighthearted pro-unity content. Safe.

input_text: Kadang-kadang aku rasa macam orang asing di negara sendiri. Bukan sebab kaum lain — sebab sistem yang buat aku rasa macam tu.
reason: Feeling alienated in own country due to systemic issues, not blaming other races directly. Nuanced personal sentiment. S1.
suggested_rewrite: Perasaan tersingkir oleh sistem perlu ditangani melalui advokasi untuk pembaharuan dasar yang lebih inklusif. Semua rakyat berhak rasa dimiliki.

input_text: Ustaz kat surau cakap: 'Bukan semua yang tak setuju dengan kita tu musuh. Kadang-kadang mereka cuma ada perspektif berbeza.' Finally, a voice of reason.
reason: Celebrating a religious leader's call for accepting different perspectives. Pro-tolerance religious speech. Safe.

input_text: Fake video going around showing 'riots in Penang.' It's actually footage from Indonesia 3 years ago. Please don't share. I've reported to MCMC.
reason: Debunking fake riot video and reporting to authorities. Active counter-misinformation citizenship. Safe.

input_text: Aku rasa Malaysia ni unik — kita boleh gaduh pasal politik siang, then malam duduk sama makan satay kat gerai. Pelik tapi best.
reason: Celebrating uniquely Malaysian ability to separate political disagreements from personal relationships. Pro-social observation. Safe.
